---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, page, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem
What user problem does this address? What question or need is currently unmet?

## Proposed Solution
How should this work? Include details about content, UX, or data requirements.

## Alternatives Considered
Are there other approaches that could address the same problem?

## Additional Context
Any references, examples, or related pages on the live site.
